description: The ScaleAligner component scales a list of slots based on bounding box, each one being bigger/smaller than the last.

fields.AutoAddChildren: Controls whether slots below this component's slot in the hierarchy are automatically added to ``_targets``
fields.BaseSize: The size the first item should be in local space based on Bounding box.
fields.Increment: How much to make the next item in the list bigger/smaller than the last by adding to its Bounding box size.
fields.Multiplier: How much to make the next item in the list bigger/smaller than the last by multiplying its Bounding box size after adding ``Increment``
fields.NonUniform: Whether scaling can be non uniform for Bounding box Scale calculations.
fields._targets: A list of slots and their scales to influence.
